accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; procedural details and timelines correctly stated.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as requiring greater transparency for regulatory actions affecting small businesses.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes changes to the initial regulatory flexibility analysis, petition process, guidance publication, and 10-year review.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the 'where feasible' condition for indirect costs and conditions for rule reinstatement.

effective_dates.why: Notes the 5-year lookback provision for Section 610 enforcement.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions: indirect cost expansion, petition review, guidance publication, and automatic rule lapse for missed periodic reviews.

correct_entities.why: SBA Chief Counsel, OIRA, regulations.gov correctly identified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
